expectations.text: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
expectations.evidence: Separate sections for dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) with environment-specific checklists.

expectations.text: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly mention Autopilot-specific limitations like no SSH, no node management. Treats clusters more generically.

expectations.text: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
expectations.evidence: Mentions deprecation audits and GKE Deprecation Insights feature.

expectations.text: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
expectations.evidence: Does not mention mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot requirement.

expectations.text: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
expectations.evidence: Covers PDBs, termination grace periods, node affinity constraints, and PVs.

expectations.text: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 post-upgrade includes verifying all nodes report 1.30.x.

expectations.text: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
expectations.evidence: Phase 2 covers application workflows, storage validation, and network/DNS.

expectations.text: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
expectations.evidence: Dev cluster section recommends using them as testing ground before prod.
Phase 2 covers observability and monitoring verification.
